sanitization: Detector name, path, and match count only. No matched value, fragment, or value-derived hash is recorded.

scanners_used.name: gitleaks
scanners_used.reason: not installed in the execution environment

breakdown.note: Loopback-only local development stack default. Not a credential.
The production-host occurrence is a redacted placeholder token inside a prior audit finding, not a value. Verified by character-class inspection without reproducing the token.

git_tracked_env_files.note: .gitignore ignores .env and .env.* while allowing *.example. git ls-files shows no tracked .env variant.

git_history_findings.impact: Anyone with read access to the repository or its history can recover a plaintext connection string for the production Postgres role on db.avmgtsonawtzebvazgcr.supabase.co and bypass every RLS policy.
required_actions: Rotate the production database password (SECRET_002) — this is mandatory and independent of any history rewrite.
Then, and only with separate written authorization, scrub the value from reachable history with git filter-repo or BFG and coordinate the force-push with every clone holder.
git_history_findings.disposition: OPEN — rotation blocked by BLOCKED_PROVIDER_ACCESS; history rewrite blocked by BLOCKED_SECRET_HISTORY_REWRITE_APPROVAL. No history rewrite and no force-push were performed.

git_history_findings.secret_id: SECRET_001, SECRET_002, SECRET_003, SECRET_004, SECRET_005, SECRET_007, SECRET_008, SECRET_010
git_history_findings.impact: A prior audit recorded that the on-disk .env held live, working values for the service-role key, database password, Supabase PAT, Vercel token, two GitHub PATs, OpenRouter key and Gemini key, and that these were exposed to audit tooling. All were declared rotation-mandatory.
git_history_findings.disposition: OPEN — the rotation checklist in that document remains entirely unchecked. AUDIT_REPORTS/89_LIVE_SECRET_CONFIGURATION.md independently confirms that JWT, anon, service-role and database credentials were not rotated.

temporary_secret_store.note: Never created, because no credential intake was required.

other_files_in_secret_store.note: Feature flags only. Not read for value, not modified.
Variable names inventoried only; values were not read.

shell_history.note: No command in this loop accepted, echoed, or passed a credential value.
